tools.note: Apple 4.4.1 build filters, sort expressions, include values, relationship limits, top-level limit, total, and continuation are exposed. Each relationship limit is accepted only with its matching include; sparse fields follow the global family policy. The tool has no MCP output schema and returns a selected build projection: documented links.related values remain *Url, documented links.self values are *RelationshipUrl, perfPowerMetricsRelationshipUrl is null because that relationship has no self link, and legacy buildBundlesUrl/buildUploadUrl compatibility keys are null because those relationships define no links.

The compact membership projection does not include builds; use the existing build tools.

The compact membership projection does not include appClips; this unrelated graph is outside the membership lookup.

operations.condition: Every call refreshes the exact product identity and name before previewing or attempting deletion.

optionalParameterClassifications.reason: Deletion preflight validates only the exact product identity and current name; it inventories workflows and build runs through dedicated fully paginated supporting operations.
Primary repositories are not included by the exact deletion identity preflight.

operations.condition: Every call inventories all workflow identities across strict pagination before previewing or attempting deletion.

optionalParameterClassifications.reason: The deletion receipt needs the complete direct workflow identity inventory, not expanded workflow relationships.

operations.condition: Every call inventories all build-run identities across strict pagination before previewing or attempting deletion.

optionalParameterClassifications.reason: Deletion impact must inventory every build run for the product rather than a caller-selected build subset.
The confirmation digest sorts validated identities locally, so Apple response ordering cannot affect the receipt.
The deletion receipt needs the complete direct build-run identity inventory, not expanded relationships.
Build resources are not included by the deletion inventory request.

fields.localRole: Must be true together with every fresh preview receipt before DELETE is attempted.
Must match the checksum-bound receipt over the latest product identity/name plus the exact sorted workflow-ID and build-run-ID inventories.
Must exactly match the latest preflight product name.
Must exactly match the fully paginated latest workflow count.
Must exactly match the fully paginated latest build-run count.
True when the call performs fresh read-only product and cardinality preflight without sending DELETE.
Fresh checksum-bound receipt over the exact sorted workflow/build-run identity inventories, plus the exact product name and public impact counts.
True for a preview or an exact empty HTTP 204 deletion response; mutation fields distinguish the two states.
True only after Apple's exact empty HTTP 204 response.
committed only for exact empty 204; not_attempted, rejected, unknown, or committed_unverified otherwise.
True for unknown or committed_unverified outcomes.
Executable xcode_cloud_products_get exact-target inspection before any retry.
False for every attempted deletion, including unknown and committed_unverified outcomes.
Exact verified 204 status on committed deletion.

tools.note: Permanent deletion is a two-step safety contract: every call refreshes exact identity and fully paginates workflow and build-run inventories with fixed limit=200 sparse requests. The receipt hashes the canonical product identity/name and exact sorted length-delimited workflow/build-run IDs, while the caller must also echo the public name/count confirmations. Exact empty 204 is the only committed success. Ambiguous or malformed accepted outcomes preserve product_id and xcode_cloud_products_get recovery guidance and are never replayed automatically.

committed for a validated 201, rejected for a definitive rejection, unknown for request ambiguity, or committed_unverified for an invalid accepted response.

Validated requested product and repository relationship identifiers retained for recovery.
False for every mutation outcome; inspect before any retry.
Exact verified 201 status.

tools.note: Complete Apple 4.4.1 workflow-create body, including every start-condition/action attribute and required relationship. Nullable optional create attributes preserve omission versus explicit null. Success requires exact 201 plus canonical identity, document self_url, resource links, requested relationship lineage, and strict validation of Apple's optional included resource union; valid included presence is preserved exactly. Ambiguous or malformed accepted outcomes fail closed with product-scoped inspection and no automatic replay.

tools.note: Complete mutable Apple 4.4.1 workflow PATCH contract. Every nullable attribute preserves value, explicit null, and omission independently; empty patches fail before network I/O. Exact 200 plus identity/path/request-lineage, document self_url, and strict optional included-union validation is required for committed success; valid included presence is preserved exactly. Ambiguous or malformed accepted outcomes fail closed with exact-target inspection.
